## Purpose
This file serves as a configuration for the diffdoc tool, specifying how it should operate within the context of the project.

## User-Visible Behavior
When the configuration is loaded, it enables the diffdoc tool with specified parameters, allowing users to execute commands defined in the configuration.

## Business Rules
The configuration specifies that the diffdoc tool is of type "local," is enabled, and has a timeout of 10 seconds for operations.

## Data Inputs And Outputs
The input to this configuration includes the schema URL and command parameters. The output is the configuration settings that dictate the behavior of the diffdoc tool.

## Side Effects
None identified.

None identified.

## Dependencies
None identified.

## Operational Notes
The command defined in the configuration utilizes `npx` to run the `diffdoc-mcp` tool with a specified configuration file, which may require the presence of the `.diffdocrc` file in the project directory.
